data.label: 阿里云云解析 DNS
data.description: 阿里云云解析DNS深度融合公共云与IDC解析能力，实现全场景覆盖、全链路解析与一站式管理，为企业提供全面、易用、高效的平台化域名解析服务。无论多云、混合云架构，还是移动应用与物联网场景，均可灵活适配，助力企业降本增效，构建稳定可靠的网络环境。

data.label: 阿里云云解析 DNS
data.description: Alibaba Cloud DNS deeply integrates public cloud and IDC DNS resolution capabilities, enabling full-scenario coverage, end-to-end resolution, and one-stop management. It provides enterprises with a comprehensive, easy-to-use, and efficient platform-based domain name resolution service. Whether for multi-cloud and hybrid-cloud architectures, or for mobile applications and IoT scenarios, it can adapt flexibly, helping enterprises reduce costs, improve efficiency, and build a stable and reliable network environment.
